news.t: 2 Volatile ETFs Are Gaining Popularity. Realize the Risks.
Energy ETFs Gain as Oil Stockpiles Fall
Energy ETFs Rally Amid Possible OPEC Production Cuts

holdings.infoBox: ERX is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 18.86%, Exxon Mobil at 16.61%, Chevron at 12.61%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 6.80%, and Energy Select Sector Index Swap at 6.28%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Energy Bull 2X ETF (ERX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Energy Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US large-cap companies in the energy industry. ERX was launched on Nov 6, 2008 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: 2 Volatile ETFs Are Gaining Popularity. Realize the Risks.
data.text: These volatile ETFs can make a lot of money in the right market, but they can lose a ton in the wrong market.

data.title: Najarian: Big buying in options of small cap, gold and energy ETFs
data.text: MarketRebellion.com co-founder Jon Najarian details the increase in recent options activity in small caps, gold and a bullish bet on energy.

data.title: Energy ETFs Gain as Oil Stockpiles Fall
data.text: Oil prices barreled higher Wednesday as the EIA reported an unexpected fall in crude stockpiles. Trade the energy sector with these ETFs.

data.title: Energy ETFs Rally Amid Possible OPEC Production Cuts
data.text: Beaten-down energy stocks have shown signs of a recovery this week. Play for further upside with these three ETFs.
